allow: Bash(then echo "✓ Mentions using skill" else echo "⚠ May not explicitly mention using skill in workflow" fi echo done)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat(know-commands): add versioning, graph population, and spec enrichment plan

- Add r1/r2 version footers to all /know commands
- Add pre-commit hook to enforce version increment on changes
- Update commands with graph population and validation instructions
- Add meta.feature_specs documentation requirements
- Add clean git state check to /know:build prerequisites
- Create spec-generation-enrichment plan for rich feature specs
- Fix know command path from ./know/know to know
EOF
)")

Bash(cd know && venv/bin/python3 -c "
from src.graph import GraphManager
from src.visualizers.base import BaseVisualizer

gm = GraphManager\('/tmp/know-test/spec-graph.json'\)
v = BaseVisualizer.__new__\(BaseVisualizer\)
v.gm = gm
v.entity_types = None
v.entity_focus = None
v.depth = None
v.include_refs = True

data = v.extract\(\)
ref_nodes = {k: n for k, n in data.nodes.items\(\) if n.get\('is_ref'\)}
by_type = {}
for k, n in ref_nodes.items\(\):
    t = n['type']
    by_type.setdefault\(t, []\).append\(k\)
for t, ids in sorted\(by_type.items\(\)\):
    print\(f'{t}: {len\(ids\)}'\)
print\(f'Total ref nodes: {len\(ref_nodes\)}'\)
print\(f'Total nodes: {len\(data.nodes\)}'\)
print\(f'Total edges: {len\(data.edges\)}'\)

# Check which refs have edges pointing to them
ref_ids = set\(ref_nodes.keys\(\)\)
refs_with_edges = set\(\)
for f, t in data.edges:
    if t in ref_ids: refs_with_edges.add\(t\)
    if f in ref_ids: refs_with_edges.add\(f\)
orphan_refs = ref_ids - refs_with_edges
print\(f'Refs with edges: {len\(refs_with_edges\)}'\)
print\(f'Orphan refs \(no edges\): {len\(orphan_refs\)}'\)
if orphan_refs:
    for o in sorted\(list\(orphan_refs\)[:10]\):
        print\(f'  {o}'\)
" 2>&1)
